$comment: Centralized provider configuration for QoS-Buddy. Add new providers here - no code changes needed!

groq.description: Fast inference platform for open source AI models

local-openai.description: Local OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio, llama-swap, vLLM, Ollama)

schema_comment.api_key_env: Environment variable name containing the API key
schema_comment.enabled: Set to false to hide from UI without removing config
schema_comment.description: Optional description shown in UI tooltips
schema_comment.timeout_seconds: Optional HTTP timeout for slow APIs (default: 10s)
